name: mark_VII_specs.txt
content:
MARK VII ARMOR
=================
Weight: 49 kg
Flight ceiling: 58,000 ft
Max speed: Mach 8.4
Arc reactor: Palladium-free Vibranium core
Weapons: Repulsors (mk IV), Unibeam, micro-missiles
